summary: Free Tier Implementation testing completed. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Pricing page, Dashboard free tier features, Copy Trading upgrade gate, and Pro user navigation with tier badges.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns user_tier field ('free', 'pro', or 'elite') ✓
GET /api/auth/me returns all required fields (id, email, name, is_verified, is_pro, is_elite, has_2fa, user_tier) ✓
GET /api/payments/packages returns 4 packages (pro_monthly, pro_yearly, elite_monthly, elite_yearly) ✓
Pro monthly package: $29/month, tier='pro' ✓
Elite monthly package: $79/month, tier='elite' ✓
Pro yearly package: $249/year, Elite yearly: $699/year ✓
POST /api/trading/execute blocks live trades for free users (returns 403) ✓
POST /api/trading/execute allows paper trades for free users ✓
GET /api/leaderboard returns max 10 traders for user_tier=free (limit enforced) ✓
GET /api/leaderboard returns full list for user_tier=pro ✓
Login flow works with demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com / NewPass1234! ✓
Login response includes user_tier field ✓
Pricing page (/pricing) shows Free, Pro, Elite plan cards ✓
Pricing page has monthly/yearly toggle that updates prices ✓
Pro plan card shows 'Most Popular' badge ✓
Free plan card shows lock icons on restricted features ✓
User dropdown shows tier badge (Pro) next to user name ✓
Dashboard shows upgrade banner for free/demo users ✓
Dashboard shows paper trading mode badge for free users ✓
Dashboard shows '15 minute delay' warning for free users ✓
Trading mode toggle shows 'Live (Pro)' locked for free users ✓
Copy trading page shows upgrade gate for free users ✓
Navigation includes Leaderboard and Pricing links ✓
PRO badge visible in navigation for Pro users ✓
critical_code_review_comments: user_tier field correctly derived from is_pro/is_elite flags in format_user_response
Leaderboard correctly limits free users to 10 traders via is_pro_user parameter
Live trading tier check properly blocks free users with 403 and descriptive error message
Pricing page correctly shows all 4 packages with correct prices
TierBadge component properly displays Free/Pro/Elite badges with appropriate styling
UpgradeBanner and PaperTradingBadge correctly hidden for Pro users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Free Tier implementation fully tested. Backend APIs correctly return user_tier field, 4 subscription packages, block live trades for free users, and limit leaderboard to 10 for free users. Frontend correctly shows upgrade banners, paper trading badges, signal delay warnings, and tier badges for both free and Pro users. Pro user demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com has is_pro=true and user_tier='pro'.

mocked_apis_list: Push notification delivery logs to console only

features_verified.free_plan_lock_icons: ✓ Free plan shows lock icons on Real-time signals, Live trading, Copy Trading, Advanced analytics

features_verified.dashboard_signal_delay_warning: ✓ Shows '15 minute delay' warning for free users
